task: Advanced high-value task: Finite-Capacity Plant Schedule Expert Signoff Checklist. Scenario: a production incident review board wants to convert raw records into a repeatable decision process for finite-capacity plant schedule. Embedded packet: Records: R1 duration_hours=50 due_day=79 machine_capacity_hours=7; R2 duration_hours=59 due_day=75 machine_capacity_hours=10; R3 duration_hours=45 due_day=90 machine_capacity_hours=6. Remediation options: O1 changes duration_hours by -12% cost=81500; O2 changes due_day by -18% cost=98300; O3 changes machine_capacity_hours by -25% cost=57700; max_budget=123600. Rules and constraints: minimize late jobs first then changeover; jobs cannot split across machines; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: produce a concise gate decision that includes calculations, caveats, residual risk, and machine-readable exception labels. Deliver finite_capacity_2.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
